memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
She married Roger de Somery.

She was granddaughter of William d'Aubigny, 2nd Earl of Arundel b 1150 d. 24 Dec 1193; Matilda de St. Hilary du Harcouet; Hugh of Kevelioc, 3rd Earl of Chester b. c 1147 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichole d'Aubigny於1210年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny37歲，母親Mabel de Chester38歲。她和Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1240年在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年30歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichole d'Aubigny于1210年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny37岁，母亲Mabel de Chester38岁。她和Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1240年在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年30岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利。

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichole d'Aubigny was born in 1210, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, was 37 and her mother, Mabel de Chester, was 38. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. She died in 1240, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichole d'Aubigny est née en 1210, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Chester, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nichole d'Aubigny 1210 in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny 37 und ihre Mutter Mabel de Chester 38. Sie hatte mit Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Dudley, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nichole d'Aubigny è nata il nel 1210 nel Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mabel de Chester, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. Morì nel 1240, nel Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichole d'Aubignyが1210年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubignyは37歳，母Mabel de Chesterは38歳であった。彼女はSir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1240年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーダドリー カストルで30歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nichole d'Aubigny(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel de Chester(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichole d'Aubigny nasceu em 1210, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mabel de Chester, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. Ela faleceu em 1240, em Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichole d'Aubigny родилась в 1210 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Chester, 38. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nichole d'Aubigny nació en 1210, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mabel de Chester, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley. Murió en 1240, en Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
